faq.question: What should homeowners know about Ply Gem West Pro Series 700?
faq.answer: Ply Gem West Pro Series 700 is part of Ply Gem's lineup: practical vinyl and aluminum collections across several value levels. Deluxe Windows checks that this collection matches the opening sizes and design goals before recommending it.

faq.question: Which configurations does Ply Gem West Pro Series 700 offer?
faq.answer: Styles, sizes, glass packages, colors and hardware for Ply Gem West Pro Series 700 depend on the current catalog. Deluxe Windows confirms available configurations for each Bay Area order.

faq.question: How is installed pricing for Ply Gem West Pro Series 700 calculated?
faq.answer: Installed pricing for Ply Gem West Pro Series 700 reflects opening dimensions, configuration, glass, finish, quantity and access. As a reference, the current promotion prices installations from $499 per window installed (regular $832).

faq.question: How does Ply Gem West Pro Series 700 compare with other Ply Gem collections?
faq.answer: Compare Ply Gem West Pro Series 700 with sibling collections on frame construction, visible glass area, energy ratings, finish options, warranty and installed cost. Ply Gem product families cover both replacement and new-construction openings.

faq.question: How do I order Ply Gem West Pro Series 700 with installation?
faq.answer: Ordering Ply Gem West Pro Series 700 starts with a free on-site measurement; Deluxe Windows then quotes the collection installed, places the factory order and schedules the crew, so one contract covers product, installation and warranty registration.
